infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ample Driver uses your location to give customers a live ETA and to detect arrival at the job.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Ample Driver tracks your location during a job so customers get live ETAs even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Ample Driver uses the camera to photograph items at pickup and delivery.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Ample Driver tracks your location during a job so customers get live ETAs even when the app is in the background.

plugins.cameraPermission: Ample Driver uses the camera to photograph items at pickup and delivery.
